meta_title: Free Facebook Image Cropper | Crop to 1.9:1 Square Online
meta_description: Crop images online instantly to fit the official Facebook aspect ratio (1.9:1). 100% private, browser-based cropping with zero quality loss.
subtitle: Crop photos perfectly for Facebook. Crop to exact 1200x630 pixels (1.9:1) instantly without server uploads.

tool_workspace.description: Upload your file to align with the official Facebook crop box (1.9:1). Processed locally in your browser.

how_to.title: How to Crop for Facebook Online
how_to.step1_text: Select your photo. The image loads instantly in your browser memory for total privacy.
how_to.step2_text: The cropping frame locks automatically to the official 1.9:1 aspect ratio.
how_to.step3_text: Drag the handles and frame your face or subject perfectly within the crop box.
how_to.step4_text: Click 'Crop' to process the photo locally and download your optimized Facebook file.

faq.q1: What is the official size for Facebook posts?
faq.a1: The standard recommended dimensions are 1200x630 pixels, which matches the 1.9:1 aspect ratio.
faq.a2: No. The tool processes your image client-side on your device's browser, keeping your data secure.
